get.description:
Liveness Check: Returns 200 immediately to signify the Python process is alive.
Useful for simple Kubernetes/Docker orchestration checks.

Readiness Check: Actively validates PostgreSQL and Redis connectivity.
Returns 200 if fully healthy, or 503 if any core downstream system is down.

Consolidated operational dashboard endpoint.
Audits Postgres latency, Redis ping, Celery Worker connectivity, Celery Beat heartbeats,
and source health aggregates.
AI Health Check: Returns provider circuit breaker state, budget, rate limiting stats.

post.description:
Register a new user account with the 'reader' role.
Automatically logs in the user and returns an access/refresh token pair.

Authenticate with email and password.
Returns access_token in JSON body and sets refresh_token as HttpOnly cookie.

Rotate the refresh token. Reads current token from cookies,
validates it, revokes the old session, creates a new one,
and returns a fresh access_token.
Log out the current session by revoking the refresh token and deleting the cookie.
Revoke ALL active sessions for the authenticated user across all devices.

Google OAuth endpoint. Requires a valid GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID configuration.
Validates token, resolves/creates user, and returns identical JWT to normal login.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile including role and permissions.

Fetch processed articles with cursor-based pagination, dynamically falling back
to freshly ingested RawArticles to verify active source crawls on the homepage UI.
Retrieve single article details by ID from processed or raw fallbacks.
Fetch all active tech news categories from the PostgreSQL database.

Enhanced search: PostgreSQL full-text search with dynamic source category filters,
tag searches, and sorting by relevance vs freshness.

post.description:
Performs a semantic search using pgvector and ranks the results using a 
Hybrid Ranker (Semantic + Keyword + Freshness + Credibility).

get.description: Returns cached high-level platform summary counts (sources, articles, AI queue).

Returns the current health status of the 6 backend infrastructure services
plus calculated overall score & grade and lightweight rolling history.
Returns current queue depth, jobs/min, and growth rate telemetry.
Returns extensible aggregated metrics for Postgres, Redis, Queue, and Thumbnail pipeline.
Returns the cached rolling pipeline log events.
Returns unread administrative notifications.
List all registered crawler sources in the dashboard registry with enabled/disabled states.

patch.description: Update configuration settings for a crawler source.

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted crawler source.
Enable or disable a specific technology news source globally.

Dispatch an asynchronous force crawl for a specific source via Celery.
Returns immediately with a task ID — crawl executes in the background worker.

get.description: List all processed articles currently in 'draft' or 'review' states awaiting editor validation.

post.description: Moderation endpoint for approving, rejecting or publishing articles.

patch.description: Update Title, Summary, and Tags of a processed article, tracking revisions automatically.

get.description: List all revisions of a specific article.

post.description: Rollback an article to a specific historical revision number.

get.description: Retrieve all registered user accounts with associated role mapping.

put.description: Modify user authorization role. Promotes/demotes user capabilities.
Disable or suspend a user account.

get.description: Fetch comprehensive historical audit log entries, supporting Cursor-based pagination and filtering.
Retrieve historical logs of AI processing jobs.

post.description: Replay a failed or dead_letter AI job by resetting its status to ai_queued and clearing error metadata.
Test an AI prompt with a given model and input text, returning the raw provider payload.

get.description: Aggregate total AI API tokens consumption and financial expenses.
Fetch all active configuration feature flags.

post.description: Enable or disable system operational parameters dynamically via feature flags.

get.description: Check the current status of the emergency ingestion pipeline cutoff switch.

post.description: Trigger emergency cutoff to halt all crawler engines and scraping queues immediately.

get.description:
Returns the operational status of all background telemetry collectors.
Determines if collectors are 'healthy', 'delayed', or 'offline'.
Standard HTTP Endpoint retrieving a current telemetry summary snapshot.
Server-Sent Events (SSE) telemetry stream wrapper as a standard alternative.

Detailed operational health status per registered scraper source.
Returns credibility ratings, reliability scores, crawlers state,
and computed latency averages.

Dynamic Intelligence Briefing for a specific trending tag.
Returns:
- Computed velocity spike
- Distinct covering sources and trust authority weighting
- Freshness calculations since last article publication
- Direct coverage article details.

Retrieve Top 10 related articles for a given article ID using the Similarity Engine.
Uses Redis caching with a 30-minute TTL.

Retrieve full processed article details by slug with dynamic metadata, 
related stories, and trusted source attribution. Fallbacks to raw_articles 
for newly ingested content dynamically.

Server-Sent Events stream of real pipeline agent events.
Subscribes to Redis pub/sub and forwards events to connected clients.

Content-based recommendations.
Takes the user's recently read articles, finds nearest neighbors,
filters out the already read articles, and returns Top N.

parameters.name: history_ids

schema.description: List of recently read article IDs
schema.title: History Ids

parameters.description: List of recently read article IDs

get.description: Lists conversations for the current user (authenticated or anonymous).

post.description: Explicitly creates a new conversation and returns its ID.

get.description: Retrieves conversation metadata and full message history.

delete.description: Deletes a conversation and all associated Redis data.

post.description:
Streams the conversational AI response using Server-Sent Events (SSE).
Requires an existing conversation_id from POST /conversations.

schema.title: Response List Workspaces Api V1 Workspaces Get
Response Create Workspace Api V1 Workspaces Post
Response Get Workspace Api V1 Workspaces  Workspace Id  Get
